Table ICM Table - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: This table is not included in the license. Active status cannot be set to true.
trans-unit.target: [NAB: REVIEW]This table is not included in the license. Active status cannot be set to true.
trans-unit.note: New translation. Target copied from source.

trans-unit.source: Only tables with subtype "Normal" can be set to active.

trans-unit.source: The “To Company” field must be filled.
